name: a.n.a Womens Crew Neck Sleeveless Vest

lots.description:
This a.n.a women's sleeveless knit vest will be your stylish new wardrobe basic you can pair with anything. Made from ribbed stretch-cotton, this fitted sleeveless top has button-loop closures along the front and delicate lettuce trims. Wear it with tailored shorts, pants or jeans.
  • Closure Type: Loop & Button
  • Fit: Fitted
  • Neckline: Crew Neck
  • Sleeve Length: Sleeveless
  • Apparel Length: 21.75 Inches - Back, 22.25 Inches - Front
  • Fiber Content: 95% Cotton, 5% Spandex
  • Fabric Description: Rib Knit
  • Care: Tumble Dry, Machine Wash
  • Material: Cotton Blend
  • Country of Origin: Imported
